推荐场景: 聚会玩笑现场｜判断玩笑是否越界
60秒任务: 「幽默边界」：礼貌差异/文化误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 文化解释｜误解修复｜语气判断｜礼貌｜幽默边界｜适应
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’m not sure that joke lands here.（判断幽默效果）
That might be funny to some people, but not to everyone.（说明受众差异）
Let’s keep the joke light.（控制幽默边界）
I didn’t realize that topic was sensitive.（承认敏感性）
I meant it playfully, not seriously.（澄清玩笑意图）
Maybe we should avoid joking about ___.（主动避开风险）
That could sound like criticism, even if it’s meant as a joke.（判断隐含影响）
Can we change the subject?（转移话题）
I don’t think everyone is comfortable with that.（观察氛围）
Thanks for telling me; I’ll be more careful.（接受提醒）
It depends on how well people know each other.（关系影响幽默）
Sarcasm doesn’t always travel well across cultures.（跨文化判断）
I’m okay with light teasing, but not ___.（设定边界）
Let’s not make it personal.（避免攻击个人）
I can see why that felt awkward.（承认尴尬）
A safer joke would be about ___.（提出替代）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: joke, humor, sarcasm, teasing, audience, topic
Verbs: joke, tease, offend, avoid, laugh, apologize
Adjectives: funny, sensitive, personal, playful, awkward, light
Social cues: silence, laughter, reaction, facial expression, group mood
Chunks: joke lands, light teasing, sensitive topic, make it personal, change the subject, across cultures
